boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: callback provenance current and matched to vendor master contact.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No source record closes the boundary; execution blocked.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: SRC-1027E2FDE3B4-CTL states required dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped differently. SRC-1027E2FDE3B4-BND confirms only callback record, not communication text, closes the release.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Callback log dependency remains open per control record. SRC-1027E2FDE3B4-CTL explicitly states the required dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped differently.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current control record does not match authorized contact and action. No valid callback provenance linked to the authorized vendor master contact exists in source records.

critical_features_preserved: callback log must match authorized contact and action
final_answer: Source records indicate the callback log dependency is unresolved and do not close the exact action boundary. SRC-1027E2FDE3B4-CTL confirms the required dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped differently. SRC-1027E2FDE3B4-BND and SRC-1027E2FDE3B4-POL jointly require a valid callback record tied to the authorized vendor master contact. Prior vendor history does not substitute for source-control authority. Escalate for matching callback provenance to the authorized vendor master contact before any release.
